environment_contract.notes: Operator tools should resolve DCOIR local configuration from Machine/System environment scope. Process-scope placeholders such as C:\path\to\dcoir-collector are invalid and should be rejected.

tools.notes: Uses System.Diagnostics.Process for git calls so native stderr/progress is logged without becoming a PowerShell error. Directory copies recurse. Missing requested paths are hard failures.

Read-only full-repo text snapshot for ChatGPT review. Defaults to DCOIR_REPO_ROOT and DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR, excludes common binary extensions and generated/dependency directories, binary-sniffs remaining files, and preserves repo-relative paths.

Manifest-driven repo patch/apply helper for ChatGPT-provided payloads. Supports payload root detection, wrapper-root stripping, explicit repo-relative copy maps, git rm deletion lists, allowed target roots, pre/post hash checks, PowerShell 5.1 compatibility, logs, and result JSON. Writes UTF-8 logs as of 2026-05-01.2.

Reusable ZIP helper for DCOIR diagnostics and upload bundles. Creates rootless ChatGPT-optimized ZIPs with forward-slash archive paths, priority triage entries first, diagnostic_index.md, captured_files.json, zip_manifest.json, hidden/system metadata filtering, optional UTF-8 normalization, and no wrapper-root junk.

Unified manifest-driven GitHub Actions tool. Modes: watch existing workflow runs, capture known run IDs, or dispatch 1..N workflow runs with per-run inputs. Live dispatch now has an explicit max_dispatch_count guard, defaults to one live dispatch, requires allow_multiple_live_dispatches=true for multi-run live batches, prints plan/phase details, records dispatch ledger evidence, preserves dispatched run state during monitoring, monitors runs, captures logs/jobs/artifacts, and packages evidence with the ChatGPT-friendly ZIP helper.
